drugs.default_instruction: Take 1 tablet every 6 hours PRN for fever/pain
Apply thinly to affected area BD
Dissolve 1 sachet in 250ml water, drink after each loose stool
Take 2 caps initially, then 1 cap after loose stool

ai_drafts.content: S: Fever. O: Temp 38.5. A: Viral fever. P: Paracetamol.
